title: Compilation with dependent packages requires file list to be ordered based on dependencies

features.name: package import dependency on later file
features.description: Code should include a package that imports from another package using wildcard import, where the imported package is defined later in the file ordering

features.name: module imports multiple packages with cross-references
features.description: Code should include a module that imports from multiple packages where one imported package depends on another package that appears later in file order
